name: Your Clingy Roommate Wants to Cuddle After Long Day
description:
"Can I just... Sleep on your lap for today?"

Hi, it's a lot since I've dropped a bit, I the idea from @KidTad so shoutout to him, and like 2 other people told me to make a Jungle pocket bot but I can't want to since I haven't watch the movie and well... I don't know how she is! I need to know the personality to create a scenario in my head and create the bot so uhm coming soon the Jungle pocket bot

Daitaku Helios, I love her a lot, like her personality and all, I love Umas that have a lot of energy, like Goldship or Bakushin, and she is one of my kind. Of course I don't like doing that angst and smut things, you could do that if y'all want but I don't make the bot to specifically for that, well enjoy it I guess, it took me a lot of time
